subject: [PATCH v4 06/10] fuse: use named constants for io-uring iovec indices

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch replaces magic indices 0 and 1 in the iovec array with named constants FUSE_URING_IOV_HEADERS and FUSE_URING_IOV_PAYLOAD, making the code self-documenting and preparing for future buffer ring support. The changes are made in the fuse:dev_uring.c file, specifically in the functions fuse_uring_get_iovec_from_sqe and fuse_uring_create_ring_ent. This patch is part of a larger series of 10 patches and has been reviewed by several kernel developers.
